reach_why: Extends known critiques of language-only reasoning into bizarre-world search-space adequacy, but does not open wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilism, search-space design, introspection limits, and theory-discovery under absurd-but-true premises.
falsifiable_why: Refuted by systems succeeding despite narrow pools, reliable self-reports, or language-only recovery of governing laws.
explanation: Truth depends on admitting strange hypotheses; introspection and language alone are weak guides to underlying law.
